class.name: CassieCurvenetKnot
class.brief_description: Per-knot animation primitive — Pixar's Curvenet Adjustment over a surface-aligned base.
class.description: Holds the projection-pose and rest-pose transforms plus the tangent set used by [CassieCurvenet.compute_orientations] (Step 1.3 of the curvenet shaping rig). The world-space basis returned by [method solve_world_transform] is the manipulator gizmo's basis after the orientation pass runs.

method.name: solve_world_transform
method.description: Returns the manipulator's world-space transform. Populated by [CassieCurvenet.compute_orientations].
